## [00:00 - 03:00]

Okay, so what exactly is an evergreen product launch? Basically, it's the way you take the power of your one-time product launch and you turn it into an ongoing process. So new leads coming into your business, no matter how they come in, those new leads, they're going to get a product launch, they're going to get the whole sequence shortly after they come into your world, after they learn about you, after they opt in, really is what we're talking about. You basically have this sequence and here's pre-launch content, pre-launch content, pre-launch content sales letter. And basically, no matter when the leads come in, shortly after they opt in, they're going to get the first piece of pre-launch content and then they're going to get the second piece, the third piece, and they're going to get the sales letter. So it's basically your launch sequence, but instead of just being a one-time episodic event, it becomes something that no matter when someone comes into your world, they are going to get your product launch. Another way you can do it is you can do a launch and then you can pull the product off the market and then do occasional relaunches.
